definition: Capacity to reduce avoidable disease injury exposure and vulnerability before shocks
measurement_note: Use immunization sanitation environmental protection chronic disease prevention housing safety and health-promotion evidence

definition: Capacity to identify threats early and maintain situational awareness
measurement_note: Use surveillance completeness laboratory turnaround wastewater monitoring reporting coverage data integration and community reporting

definition: Capacity to maintain essential public health and healthcare services during disruption
measurement_note: Use emergency care primary care maternal care medication vaccination dialysis mental health laboratory and public-health service continuity

definition: Capacity to sustain trained protected supported workers during routine operations and surge
measurement_note: Use staffing vacancies training safety absenteeism burnout retention cross-training and surge capacity data

definition: Capacity to coordinate finance learn revise policy and act under uncertainty
measurement_note: Use legal authority coordination budgets after-action implementation data governance procurement and public accountability

definition: Capacity to communicate credibly and enable public action through legitimacy
measurement_note: Use trusted messengers language access communication reach community partnership misinformation monitoring and public confidence

definition: Extent to which resilience protects vulnerable populations and fair access
measurement_note: Use disaggregated outcomes service access recovery resource distribution participation disability access and exposure data

definition: Administrative logistical financial and political burden required to implement a strategy
measurement_note: Higher values should trigger implementation feasibility review and capacity planning
